---
name: Provider request
about: Ask for support for a new model provider
title: "[provider] "
labels: provider
---

**Provider**
Name + link to its API docs.

**API shape**
- Is it OpenAI-compatible (`/chat/completions`)? If so, the base URL.
- Or a native API? Link the text / image / embeddings endpoints.

**Capabilities** (check what it offers)
- [ ] Text completion
- [ ] JSON / structured output
- [ ] Image generation
- [ ] Streaming
- [ ] Tool / function calling
- [ ] Embeddings

**Auth**
How are keys issued (free tier? key prefix?), and any quotas worth noting.
